Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Huy N. Trinh Individually, Dba Y2y Plumbing & Heating Should Not Be Held In Contempt
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition had been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
